description_long: This bollard is a tall, octagonal column with a sleek, modern design, primarily colored in dark gray with distinct light blue accent lines running vertically along its edges and horizontally near the top and base. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely constructed from metal, giving it a robust and durable appearance suitable for urban environments. The top of the bollard is flat with beveled edges, matching the octagonal profile of the shaft. The base is slightly wider, also featuring blue accent lines that enhance its visibility and add a contemporary touch. There are no visible openings, chains, or connectors, indicating it is a standalone barrier. Its design suggests it is intended to control vehicle or pedestrian access while providing a visually striking presence.
description: A tall, octagonal, dark gray bollard with light blue accent lines and a flat, beveled top, featuring a smooth, metallic surface and a modern urban design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the octagonal shape, blue accent lines, and flat beveled top clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical blue lines and the uniform, smooth surface of the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view is similar to the front, with the same accent lines and beveled top visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the side, showing the consistent design and blue accents.
